cue.name: ConfigInitV3
cue.comment: Renamed: old non-instantiate ConfigInit stuck as complete in saves

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] Initializing configuration system...'

set_value.name: $existingTradingConfig
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$Trading? then global.$GT_Config.$Trading else table[]

set_value.name: $existingNotificationsConfig
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$Notifications? then global.$GT_Config.$Notifications else table[]

set_value.name: $existingDefenseConfig
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$Defense? then global.$GT_Config.$Defense else table[]

set_value.name: $existingFleetConfig
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$Fleet? then global.$GT_Config.$Fleet else table[]

set_value.name: $existingMarketConfig
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$Market? then global.$GT_Config.$Market else table[]

set_value.name: $existingWareFilterConfig
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$WareFilter? then global.$GT_Config.$WareFilter else table[]

set_value.name: $existingDebugConfig
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$Debug? then global.$GT_Config.$Debug else table[]

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$MinAbsoluteProfit
set_value.comment: Absolute minimum profit (100 Cr in RAW format)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$SellPriceMax
set_value.comment: Normal: buy below -20% (only cheap offers). Range -1.0 to 1.0

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$BuyPriceMin
set_value.comment: Normal: sell above +20% (only expensive buyers). Range -1.0 to 1.0

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$IsolatedSellPriceMax
set_value.comment: Isolated: no filter (+100%). Accept any trade when stuck in single sector

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$IsolatedBuyPriceMin
set_value.comment: Isolated: no filter (-100%). Accept any trade when stuck in single sector

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$FallbackSellPriceMax
set_value.comment: Fallback: buy up to +20% above average. Relaxed filter when normal search fails

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$FallbackBuyPriceMin
set_value.comment: Fallback: sell down to -20% below average. Relaxed filter when normal search fails

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$XP.$BaseXPPerTrade
set_value.comment: Base XP awarded per successful trade (diff patch system)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$XP.$ValueDivisor
set_value.comment: Trade value divisor for value multiplier calculation

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$XP.$MinerValueDivisor
set_value.comment: Miner delivery value divisor for XP scaling (amount * ware average price)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$XP.$QualityMultiplier
set_value.comment: Quality bonus multiplier (X4 quality * this value)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$XP.$MaxDistanceForBonus
set_value.comment: Maximum sector distance for distance bonus

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Training.$RequiredLevels
set_value.comment: Levels that require training (every 3rd skill level for rank progression)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Training.$SkillMultiplier
set_value.comment: Additional time per skill level (skill_based mode)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Training.$RequireStation
set_value.comment: Must be docked at valid station

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Fleet.$MaxShipsPerRoute
set_value.comment: Maximum ships on same trade route

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Market.$PriceHistorySize
set_value.comment: Number of price points to track

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$WareFilter.$BlacklistedWares
set_value.comment: List of wares to exclude from trading (populated dynamically)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$WareFilter.$WhitelistedWares
set_value.comment: List of allowed wares (empty = all except blacklisted)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$WareFilter.$MinWareValue
set_value.comment: Minimum value per unit to consider

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$WareFilter.$MaxWareValue
set_value.comment: Maximum value per unit (0 = no limit)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$WareFilter.$HighValueThreshold
set_value.comment: Price threshold for high-value classification (1000 Cr in RAW format)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$WareFilter.$RefreshInterval
set_value.comment: How often to refresh ware categories

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Defense.$UnifiedThreshold
set_value.comment: Restock unified capacity when below 70% total usage

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$Debug.$DiagnosticQueries
set_value.comment: Enable diagnostic queries (4 galaxy-wide scans per cache miss - expensive!)

set_value.name: global.$GT_Config.$ConfigVersion
set_value.comment: Configuration schema version (v2 = fixed training levels)

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] INIT: Version=' + global.$GT_Config.$Version + ' ConfigSchema=' + global.$GT_Config.$ConfigVersion
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Checking for pilots incorrectly blocked under old training system...'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] RETROACTIVE FIX: Clearing incorrect XP block for pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' (skill level ' + $currentSkillLevel + ', XP: ' + global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] RETROACTIVE FIX COMPLETE: Cleared XP blocks for ' + $fixedPilots + ' pilots'

show_notification.text: 'GalaxyTrader MK3: Fixed XP progression for ' + $fixedPilots + ' pilots!'

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] No incorrectly blocked pilots found'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Configuration system initialized successfully'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] ⚡ Configuration event system initialized (event-driven)'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] ⚡ Processing ' + global.$GT_ConfigEventQueue.count + ' config events instantly'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Config update event: ' + $section + '.' + $key + ' = ' + $value + ' (source: ' + $source + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Invalid configuration: ' + $message
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Configuration validated: ' + $section + '.' + $key
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Validating configuration...'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid MinROI, reset to 10%'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid MinAbsoluteProfit, reset to 100Cr (10000 RAW)'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid RiskTolerance, reset to default'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid FactionPriority, reset to 0 (equal)'

do_if.value: global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$SellPriceMax? and (global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$SellPriceMax lt -1.0 or global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$SellPriceMax gt 1.0)

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid SellPriceMax, reset to -0.2 (-20%)'

do_if.value: global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$BuyPriceMin? and (global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$BuyPriceMin lt -1.0 or global.$GT_Config.$Trading.$BuyPriceMin gt 1.0)

debug_text.text: '[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid BuyPriceMin, reset to 0.2 (+20%)'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid IsolatedSellPriceMax, reset to 1.0'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid IsolatedBuyPriceMin, reset to -1.0'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid FallbackSellPriceMax, reset to 0.2'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid FallbackBuyPriceMin, reset to -0.2'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] ERROR: Invalid level requirements table'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid BlacklistedWares, reset to empty'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] WARNING: Invalid DangerousWareHandling, reset to avoid'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Configuration validation complete'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] MANUAL CLEANUP: Forcing immediate pilot block cleanup...'

'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Pilot ' + $pilot.name + ': skill=' + $currentSkillLevel + ', in training list=' + global.$GT_Config.$Training.$RequiredLevels.indexof.{$currentSkillLevel} + ', should be blocked=' + $shouldBeBlocked
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] MANUAL CLEANUP: Clearing incorrect XP block for pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' (skill level ' + $currentSkillLevel + ', XP: ' + global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP + ')'
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] MANUAL CLEANUP COMPLETE: Fixed ' + $fixedPilots + ' pilots'
'[GT-Init] Initializing global table structures...'
'[GT-Init] WARNING: global.$GT_TradeCache has invalid type (' + typeof global.$GT_TradeCache + ') - resetting to table[] (old save migration)'
'[GT-Init] Initialized ' + $initCount + ' global table structure(s)'
'[GT-Init] All global table structures already valid'

append_to_list.name: $warnings
append_to_list.exact: 'No compatible wares found for this ship'
